description: LTX 2.3 22B image+audio→video — 720p 24fps, lip sync, dual-pass upscale
prompt_guide: Describe motion, camera, and character action. This model takes audio input and lip-syncs characters to the vocals. For scenes with characters: describe them speaking, rapping, or singing. Include scene/character/action/camera structure. The audio drives lip movement and facial expression — you do NOT need to describe sounds. Duration is set separately (default 9s). Keep under 150 words.
